creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

> Sidebar at pages such as <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/>. 

13.0 remains there, and in the sidebar at <https://www.freebsd.org/where/>, ... maybe I missed something. 

----

<https://reviews.freebsd.org/D36520#829374>: 

> ...  We will handle the rest in another review, ...

-- to include removal of <https://www.freebsd.org/where/#download-rel130>.
